title: Better Villagers
description: Giving Villagers, Pillagers and Golems a brand new look.
body:
This pack does more than just remove the iconic villager nose: it gives them new facial features that are reminescent of Steve's. And this isn't limited to villagers either - the wandering trader, illagers and witch also received a glow-up. For pillagers, the Bad Omen effect, the Totem of Undying and the Ravager were also changed visually to get rid of the nose.

Lastly, the pack tackles Iron and Snow Golems: their names have been changed to "Iron Giant" and "Snowman" respectively, and the Iron Golem has a new skin altogether, based on the Blast Furnace Golem concept.

Includes mod support for:

• Supplementaries
